description: A ground-level photograph depicts an open landscape under a clear blue sky. In the foreground on the left, there is a medium-sized tree with dense, yellowish-green foliage. The ground across the image is largely bare or covered with sparse, dry, light-brown vegetation and some small bushes. In the mid-ground and background, numerous other trees, varying in size and density, extend towards the horizon, some with darker green foliage. The scene is consistent with a "Mixed plantation" (EUNIS G4.F) or "Transitional Woodland and Scrub" (3.4.0.0) land cover type, as described in Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) documentation.
